summary: Affiliate Attribution E2E Testing - All tests passed. Backend: 14/14 tests passed covering guest checkout with valid/invalid/no affiliate code, account checkout quote with affiliate, DB verification of attribution fields. Frontend: localStorage persistence of affiliate_code through navigation, checkout page shows affiliate code persists, admin promotion engine shows active 5% promo, staff portal loads with StaffLayout after login.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing TESTAFFI affiliate (email: test.affiliate@example.com, name: Test Affiliate)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Affiliate Attribution E2E is complete and verified. Key points: 1) TESTAFFI affiliate exists in DB with promo_code=TESTAFFI, affiliate_code=TESTAFFI, email=test.affiliate@example.com, name=Test Affiliate, status=active. 2) POST /api/public/checkout with affiliate_code=TESTAFFI creates order with affiliate_code, affiliate_email, affiliate_name, affiliate_id, attribution_captured_at fields populated. 3) POST /api/public/checkout WITHOUT affiliate_code creates order with affiliate_code=None. 4) POST /api/public/checkout with invalid affiliate_code stores code but affiliate_email=None (not hydrated). 5) POST /api/customer/checkout-quote with affiliate_code stores attribution on quote in quotes_v2 collection. 6) Frontend: visiting /marketplace?ref=TESTAFFI stores 'TESTAFFI' in localStorage as 'affiliate_code'. 7) affiliate_code persists through navigation to PDP and checkout. 8) Admin promotion engine at /admin/promotion-engine shows active 'Launch Special 5% Off' promotion. 9) Staff portal at /staff loads StaffLayout with Sales Command Center after login.
